column1: # HoopsValue - actual 2026 player/team OPTION decisions for players still showing in
# the Free Agent list. Most resolutions are DERIVED automatically: a player who shows a
# "Player Option" status and also signed a new tracked deal necessarily OPTED OUT
# list renders "PO Opt Out - Signed" without an entry here. This file is only for players
# who resolved their option WITHOUT a tracked new deal:
#   - team picked up / declined a team option                  -> to_in / to_out
#   figure_M  = the option's dollar value in $M (for reference)
# Add a row when a player in the FA list resolves an option but isn't in real_signings.
